title: Will Gemini hold the #1 Chatbot Arena spot on Dec 31, 2026?
description: Resolves YES if a Gemini-branded model is ranked first on the public Chatbot Arena leaderboard at market close.
resolution_rules: Only the public leaderboard rank at close matters. It does not resolve on TPU capacity, training efficiency, causal model capability, or enterprise adoption.

title: Will Google make TPU v7 generally available before 2027?
description: Resolves YES if Google Cloud announces general availability of TPU v7 before Jan 1, 2027.
resolution_rules: Product availability announcement only. Does not resolve on Gemini benchmark quality or whether TPU hardware closes model gaps.
